calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-18-2014 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance nor objection. Court Mail returned by post office "Not Deliverable as Addressed, Unable to Forward". Court orders case dismissed. Court also orders sanctions previously issued to Bryce Tubb for failure to appear at the JUL-29-2014 Order to Show Cause hearing vacted. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-31-2014 Continued To Sep-16-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to SEP-16-2014 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)
